judge_reason: The descriptions disagree on key visual elements (e.g., the central figure's pose, presence of a cross, presence of a star) and on the specific quoted text within the images.
original_image_tags: Black-and-white photograph of a fresco depicting a crowded scene of robed figures, possibly biblical or historical, gathered outdoors. In the upper left background, a large, dark, bell-shaped or bell-bottomed object is depicted in the sky.

Black-and-white photograph of a circular religious icon depicting "The Resurrection of our Lord Jesus Christ". A central figure (Jesus) is shown ascending or rising above a tomb, surrounded by soldiers and other figures. The scene is set within a landscape with buildings in the background. The object labeled as "The House of the Lord" in the text is depicted in the upper portion of the icon as a large, dark, circular or bell-shaped object in the sky.

Black-and-white photograph of a fresco or mural painting showing a group of figures, possibly angels or saints, with large wings, clustered together and appearing to fly or be carried towards the left. They are depicted against a dark background with some architectural elements visible.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: Three black-and-white illustration panels depicting groups of people and UFO-like craft in the sky; the upper panel shows a crowd looking upward at a pointed flying object, the middle panel shows a religious fresco with figures and angels above a chapel-like scene, and the lower panel shows a crowd beside a building with a disc-shaped craft overhead.
